name: ASRock Z890 PRO-A ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-9066+(OC) - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 4x M.2 Slots - Thunderbolt 4 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5Gb LAN
